heightfield_candidate.source_crs: USGS ImageServer export sample; final canyon working CRS, river-mile stationing, and Unreal transform still require review

target_unreal.intended_import_target: Unreal Landscape import-test level or replacement terrain layer
target_unreal.reason_disabled: Heightfield is a Lees Ferry sample export, not a complete Grand Canyon corridor terrain with river-mile conditioning and guide/oarsman review.

required_before_enable: Replace the sample export with reviewed canyon corridor DEM/lidar tiles or explicitly approve a limited Lees Ferry import-test scope.
Record source CRS, working CRS, vertical datum handling, river-mile stationing, and WGS84/local/Unreal transforms.
Clip and condition the DEM to the reviewed canyon corridor, banks, bars, tributaries, and rowing line context.
Burn or otherwise encode the reviewed channel and large-volume river surface interface so the Landscape does not fight water validation.
Attach guide/oarsman review for scale, travel pacing, access, and safety-sensitive details.
Run editor import/export validation and refreshed guide-seat/river-eye captures before replacing procedural terrain.
notes: This contract gives the Colorado heightfield candidate a traceable Unreal-side target and gate.
It must not be treated as production terrain or solver geometry until the canyon conditioning gates pass.
